title: DonutSMP Money Display Mod
description: A mod that displays players money on DonutSMP
body:
# Donut Money Display

A simple client-side mod for DonutSMP that shows player balances right above their nametags.

## Why use this?
Normally, you have to type commands to see how much money someone has. This mod just puts it on their nametag so you can see it instantly. It's really useful for trading or checking balances without spamming chat commands.

## I don't associate with DonutUTILS
Recently, it has come to my attentions people got "ratted," but it's not my mod that did so; it was donutUtils

## Preview:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6037aaa86b5526bbe9f01113a39a96de8667a848.png) 

## Features
*   **Live Balance Tracking:** Shows player money above nametags automatically.
*   **Clean Design:** Looks like a natural part of the game interface.
*   **No Lag:** Optimized to run smoothly without affecting your FPS.

## Coming Soon
This is the first of several tools I'm working on for DonutSMP. Stay tuned for more updates and new mods that will make playing on the server even better.
